briefs.title: IG Carousel 九日包｜獨立咖啡店 Day 1｜靜謐拱窗編輯誌
briefs.focus: 品牌初識｜為什麼我們慢一點
briefs.meta: 第 1/9 套｜靜謐拱窗編輯誌 · 9 張獨立 4:5 圖卡
briefs.summary: 本輪 9 天鎖定「獨立咖啡店」，九天使用九套不重複設計系統。今天是「靜謐拱窗編輯誌」：同品牌色彩、字體與 Logo 語言，但封面、圖片框、資訊層級及裝飾均與其他天不同。

items.purpose: 品牌初識｜為什麼我們慢一點
items.text:
Generate exactly ONE standalone Instagram carousel card, slide 1 of 9. Do not create a collage, contact sheet, grid, multiple cards, phone mockup or surrounding white canvas. Output aspect ratio 4:5, 1080×1350, edge-to-edge. This card belongs to a coordinated nine-card system for 獨立咖啡店, topic “品牌初識｜為什麼我們慢一點”. TEMPLATE FAMILY quiet-arch-editorial｜靜謐拱窗編輯誌 (one of nine deliberately different template families). Keep Mori Café's brand DNA consistent, but never reuse another day's cover grid, photo mask, information rhythm or decorative device. Family-specific design system: asymmetrical literary editorial pages, one tall arched photo window, generous cream negative space, fine serif rules and tiny botanical marks. Shared brand palette: warm cream paper texture, espresso brown and muted sage, soft morning sunlight, restrained organic shapes, subtle film grain, consistent 80px safe margin, Traditional-Chinese serif paired with a clean sans-serif. Layout: a tall arched coffee photograph occupies the right 44%; a quiet left-aligned headline stack sits low on the left; one thin vertical rule and a tiny leaf mark. Render this Traditional-Chinese sample copy as visible, professionally typeset text:
LOGO：Mori Café
小主題／KICKER：TODAY'S PAUSE
大主題／HEADLINE：一杯咖啡，也可以是今天的休息鍵
內文／BODY：讓日常慢一點，也讓選擇更適合自己。
MOOD：今天不必很快，也能好好前進。
CTA：向左滑看下一張 →
HASHTAG：#MoriCafe #咖啡日常 #慢生活

items.purpose: 可販售模板｜靜謐拱窗編輯誌
items.text: CANVA TEMPLATE SPEC｜Template family: 靜謐拱窗編輯誌 (quiet-arch-editorial). 1080×1350 px, 9 separate pages. Family design grammar: asymmetrical literary editorial pages, one tall arched photo window, generous cream negative space, fine serif rules and tiny botanical marks. Safe margin 80 px. Rebuild each generated reference with named editable layers: LOGO, KICKER, HEADLINE, BODY, MOOD, CTA, HASHTAG, PAGE_NO, PHOTO and DECORATIVE_ELEMENT. Use at most two font families and three brand colors. Build page 1 cover, pages 2–8 alternating education/story layouts, page 9 CTA. Use the generated cards only as layout references; replace their baked text with editable Canva text and replace photography with its own frame. Save as a master design, duplicate before each client edit, then create a Brand Template link for customers.

A grid, contact-sheet rhythm or multi-frame layout is allowed only when today's named template family explicitly requests it; it must still remain one standalone card. Output aspect ratio 4:5, 1080×1350, edge-to-edge. This card belongs to a coordinated nine-card system for 獨立咖啡店, topic “九日收尾｜收藏與到店行動”. TEMPLATE FAMILY campaign-poster｜九日收尾活動海報 (one of nine deliberately different template families). Keep Mori Café's brand DNA consistent, but never reuse another day's cover grid, photo mask, information rhythm or decorative device. Family-specific design system: confident campaign poster, full-bleed lifestyle image, oversized condensed headline, date badge, offer block and strong action hierarchy. Shared brand palette: warm cream paper texture, espresso brown and muted sage, soft morning sunlight, restrained organic shapes, subtle film grain, consistent 80px safe margin, Traditional-Chinese serif paired with a clean sans-serif. Layout: a recap or bridge page that resolves the story and gives one reason to continue to the final card; family-specific treatment: full-bleed photo with one oversized typographic statement. Render only the copy roles assigned to this slide—do not add Logo, Mood, CTA or hashtags when they are not listed below. Professionally typeset this Traditional-Chinese sample copy:
收束句／TAKEAWAY：收藏、分享，然後找一天真的來休息。
輕提示／SOFT PROMPT：值得的話，先收藏起來。
頁碼：8/9
Keep every visible component visually separable for later rebuilding in Canva, including its text roles, page number, photo or diagram and decorative elements. Do not print layer-instruction labels. Use real legible Traditional Chinese, not random glyphs or fake text. No watermark, signature or imitation of an existing brand/designer.

items.text: CANVA TEMPLATE SPEC｜Template family: 九日收尾活動海報 (campaign-poster). 1080×1350 px, 9 separate pages. Family design grammar: confident campaign poster, full-bleed lifestyle image, oversized condensed headline, date badge, offer block and strong action hierarchy. Safe margin 80 px. Rebuild each generated reference with named editable layers based on what that page actually uses; do not force LOGO, MOOD, CTA or HASHTAG onto every page. Use at most two font families and three brand colors. Build page 1 as the hook; pages 2–4 establish and explain; page 5 creates visual breathing room; pages 6–7 compare or prove; page 8 recaps; page 9 carries the brand and CTA. Use the generated cards only as layout references; replace their baked text with editable Canva text and replace photography with its own frame. Save as a master design, duplicate before each client edit, then create a Brand Template link for customers.
